deep_dive.title: AutoVSR: Automatic Visual-to-Symbolic Reasoning for Symbolic Expression Generation from Circuit Schematic
deep_dive.abstract: Symbolic expressions can effectively characterize and predict circuit behavior, but deriving them directly from circuit schematics is challenging. This process requires accurate visual-to-symbolic construction of circuit structure from images and correct multi-step symbolic derivation, both of which impose strict correctness requirements. This work proposes AutoVSR, an automated framework for visual-to-symbolic generation of circuit expressions using Vision Language Models (VLMs). By reconstructing circuit diagrams into an executable intermediate representation (Executable IR) and leveraging a symbolic solver for reasoning, AutoVSR significantly improves the accuracy of symbolic expression generation. AutoVSR introduces two key innovations: an IR construction method guided by component rule retrieval and verification-based feedback, and a symbolic solver implemented as a planning agent equipped with a symbolic tool library for reliable multi-step derivation. Compared with end-to-end VLM approaches and specialized methods on the main symbolic expression generation task, AutoVSR achieves accuracy improvements of 30.01--59.45% and 41.96--51.84%, respectively. Moreover, AutoVSR surpasses closed-source state-of-the-art VLMs in inference cost and computational efficiency. Code is available at https://github.com/LongfeiLi1/AutoVSR.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Uses Vision Language Models to generate symbolic expressions from circuit schematics
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 使用视觉语言模型从电路原理图生成符号表达式
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 使用视觉语言模型从电路原理图生成符号表达式
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 使用视觉语言模型从电路原理图生成符号表达式
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: AutoVSR automatically generates symbolic expressions from circuit schematics using Vision Language Models, improving accuracy for circuit analysis and verification.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: AutoVSR提出一个自动化框架，利用视觉语言模型（VLM）从电路原理图图像中重建可执行中间表示（Executable IR），再通过符号求解器进行推理，显著提升了符号表达式生成的准确率。该方法有效解决了从电路图直接推导符号表达式的难点，为电路分析与形式验证提供了新的自动化途径。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: AutoVSR提出一个自动化框架，利用视觉语言模型（VLM）从电路原理图图像中重建可执行中间表示（Executable IR），再通过符号求解器进行推理，显著提升了符号表达式生成的准确率。该方法有效解决了从电路图直接推导符号表达式的难点，为电路分析与形式验证提供了新的自动化途径。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: Papers central to 搜索关于大语言模型在硬件形式验证中应用的论文。, especially work that connects or combines: large language model for hardware formal verification; hardware formal verification using large language models; RTL verification with LLMs; What are the latest advances in applying LLMs to formal verification of RTL designs?; Can LLMs assist in model checking and theorem proving for hardware design?.

deep_dive.title: Faithful Autoformalization of Natural Language Assertions
deep_dive.abstract: Formal contracts are essential for software testing and verification, yet writing them remains labor-intensive and error-prone. LLMs offer a promising path toward autoformalization: synthesizing executable assertions from natural-language specifications and thereby bridging the gap between informal developer intent and formal executable specifications. We present Monty: an autoformalization framework for assertions that tackles the challenges of expectations of validity of assertions and ambiguity in natural-language. Our techniques are based on filtering formalizations using a novel conformance score metric and validity scores obtained from testing the code against formalized assertions. We evaluate our approach on 541 assertion-generation tasks derived from 22 collection-like Java classes, and show that our technique produces the ground truth more reliably (improving upto 20 points in precision on average) than when using LLMs naively to translate assertions.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: LLMs for autoformalizing natural language assertions
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 使用大语言模型自动形式化自然语言断言
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 使用大语言模型自动形式化自然语言断言
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 使用大语言模型自动形式化自然语言断言
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Monty framework uses LLMs to synthesize executable assertions from natural language, leveraging conformance and validity scores to ensure faithfulness, evaluated on 541 software assertion tasks.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 本文提出Monty框架，利用大语言模型从自然语言规格说明中综合可执行的断言，通过新颖的一致性评分和从代码测试获得的效度评分来筛选形式化结果，解决了断言正确性和自然语言歧义性问题。在22个仓库的541个断言生成任务上评估，展示了LLM在自动形式化中的潜力。该方法可直接迁移到硬件断言（如SystemVerilog）的自动生成，为RTL形式验证提供支持。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 本文提出Monty框架，利用大语言模型从自然语言规格说明中综合可执行的断言，通过新颖的一致性评分和从代码测试获得的效度评分来筛选形式化结果，解决了断言正确性和自然语言歧义性问题。在22个仓库的541个断言生成任务上评估，展示了LLM在自动形式化中的潜力。该方法可直接迁移到硬件断言（如SystemVerilog）的自动生成，为RTL形式验证提供支持。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: AI driven techniques for RTL verification and assertion property checking

deep_dive.title: Faithful Autoformalization of Natural Language Assertions
deep_dive.abstract: Formal contracts are essential for software testing and verification, yet writing them remains labor-intensive and error-prone. LLMs offer a promising path toward autoformalization: synthesizing executable assertions from natural-language specifications and thereby bridging the gap between informal developer intent and formal executable specifications. We present Monty: an autoformalization framework for assertions that tackles the challenges of expectations of validity of assertions and ambiguity in natural-language. Our techniques are based on filtering formalizations using a novel conformance score metric and validity scores obtained from testing the code against formalized assertions. We evaluate our approach on 541 assertion-generation tasks derived from 22 collection-like Java classes, and show that our technique produces the ground truth more reliably (improving upto 20 points in precision on average) than when using LLMs naively to translate assertions.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: uses LLMs to autoformalize assertions for formal verification
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 利用大语言模型自动形式化断言用于形式验证
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 利用大语言模型自动形式化断言用于形式验证
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 利用大语言模型自动形式化断言用于形式验证
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Monty framework uses LLMs with conformance scoring and testing to faithfully synthesize executable formal assertions from natural language, evaluated on 541 tasks.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文针对自然语言规格说明自动形式化为可执行断言的挑战，提出Monty框架，利用大语言模型生成候选形式化断言，并通过新颖的一致性分数和基于测试的有效性验证进行过滤，从而高质量地桥接非正式意图与形式化规格，在541个断言生成任务上验证了有效性，为软件测试与验证中的合约自动化提供了可靠方案。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 该论文针对自然语言规格说明自动形式化为可执行断言的挑战，提出Monty框架，利用大语言模型生成候选形式化断言，并通过新颖的一致性分数和基于测试的有效性验证进行过滤，从而高质量地桥接非正式意图与形式化规格，在541个断言生成任务上验证了有效性，为软件测试与验证中的合约自动化提供了可靠方案。
